title: 40 SWAT Officers Face Utah's Deadliest Shooter Situation
description:
If you're struggling with OCD or unrelenting intrusive thoughts, NOCD can help. Book a free 15 minute call to get started: https://learn.nocd.com/insanity

---
This sniper just took a shot at an armed fugitive holding a family of 5 hostage in their home.

The gunman, Joseph Anthony Manhard, is a man with a purpose. He has a vendetta, and he’s going on a rampage - planning to kill his ex-girlfriend and multiple other people who wronged him in the past.

Police don’t know how far he’s gotten on his list of targets, and if they don’t capture him here, this family could be next.
